     3	class BookingPolicy < Rhino::ResourcePolicy
     4	  self.resource_slug = 'bookings'
     5	
     6	  def permitted_attributes_for_show(user)
     7	    return ['*'] if has_role?(user, 'owner') || has_role?(user, 'admin') || has_role?(user, 'staff') || has_role?(user, 'customer')
     8	    []
     9	  end
    10	def hidden_attributes_for_show(user)
    11	  []
    12	end
    13	  def permitted_attributes_for_create(user)
    14	    return ['*'] if has_role?(user, 'owner')
    15	    return ['time_slot_id', 'notes'] if has_role?(user, 'customer')
    16	    []
    17	  end
    18	  def permitted_attributes_for_update(user)
    19	    return ['*'] if has_role?(user, 'owner')
    20	    return ['status'] if has_role?(user, 'admin') || has_role?(user, 'staff')
    21	    return ['status', 'notes'] if has_role?(user, 'customer')
    22	    []
    23	  end
